programme.title: Addams Family 117
programme.desc: Addams Family 117

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: April Lopez returns as a lounge singer Bud and Margarets kids disrupt their parents second honeymoon with constant needs World War 2 veteran Frank and USO entertainer Eve reunite after thirty-five years

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: After Dr Tracy and the Wameru compound are awarded a grant of 75000 by a wildlife conservation group two thieves kidnap Judy and Clarence and hold them for ransom to get the money for themselves

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When a researcher is kidnapped in a South American country by an old adversary of Jonathans he undertakes to personally deliver the ransom and ensure the safety of the researcher and his pregnant wife

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: When Sgt McKennas drug rehab sponsor is caught with cocaine his defending of him gives Christine doubts over whether he was ever really drug-free himself

programme.title: Starsky 322
programme.desc: Starsky 322

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: A young hotshot helicopter pilot named Kevin takes a job sweeping the hangar at Santini Air after his guardian uncle is killed by some past associates Those associates wanted his uncle to go back into the drug smuggling business with them Now Kevin is on the lookout for them and uses his position at Santini Air to try to garner some revenge Unfortunately he costs Santini a commercial contract in the process and almost loses the trust of his newfound friends

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A Nazi scientist uses a cursed amulet to bring a Nazi colonel back to life in order to kill Jack and his old army buddies

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate takes over Sams newspaper column called Dear Minerva to give anonymous advice

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe tricks Kate to take his place on serving as a jury But when he discovers he has won the raffle and the ticket is in Kates suitcase he rushes to Pixley to retrieve it

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When Nick Knight goes to investigate the alleged suicide of a space scientist he discovers that an asteroid is heading for Earth and is projected to strike within 3 months

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: The spirit of a dead voodoo priestess strikes out at three voodoo Legbas to get their power and resurrect herself and take revenge on the fourth Legba who killed her

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After teenager Adam is coerced into having a one-night-stand with Loni a girl he meets at a party he finds that shes looking for a more permanent relationship Meanwhile Adams friend Max is forced to abandon his planned summer trip and take a job in a pizza place working under his creepy tyrannical uncle

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Peggy wants to make sure her honeymoon turns out perfect

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Jonas has been forced into mandatory retirement He cant relax though because Anitas friends are driving him crazy

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Loud arrogant and obnoxious criminal Trout feels a strong kinship with and develops an immediate affinity for nerdy mild-mannered and soft-spoken serial killer Wax However the close bond between these two radically contrasting lunatics falls apart after the pair pick up a brash prostitute

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Deranged Peter relentlessly stalks and terrorizes Teresa a lovely young lady who Peter thinks is his ex-wife Melissa Peter frightens Teresa out of her wits by playing a series of cruel jokes on her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A series of deaths from bad prosthetic devices are blamed on product tampering

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The presence of a masterful escape-artist POW threatens to destabilize Hogans set-up at Stalag 13

programme.title: Hogans 319
programme.desc: Hogans 319

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Binghamton finds out that Parker is an old friend of a famous War Correspondent he makes Parker the Base PR Officer in the hope of becoming the subject of the Correspondents next story But Parkers plan to improve The Captains image backfires

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber and the guys concoct a very tall story to try to turn Tinker into a hero so that he can win the heart of his favorite girl But the rumor of Tinkers Secret mission soon spreads throughout the South Pacific and trouble develops when glory-hungry Binghamton tries to get in on the action

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and the Skipper construct a raft and set out to sea to find help Back on the island the remaining castaways are worried about possible headhunters

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways fight over their living arrangements as a violent storm approaches the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A conflict arises between Luke and Kate when Grandpa monopolizes all of Lukes free time but Grandpa decides to make amends after Pepino makes him aware that he is the source of the problem

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke convince Kate to enter a local merchants Mrs Homemaker Contest when they realize that the first prize of 50 in merchandise would almost exactly cover the cost of the new gun theyve been admiring

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After every number two man at CONTROL is killed Hymie becomes number two

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS puts up a reward for anyone who can Get Smart!

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 2

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Merrill expects a prestigious award but the presenter is not whom he expects Adam is attached to elderly George and Gloria Hancock from his hometown Recently divorced Dan Holt runs into his ex-wifes lawyer Ann Sterling

programme.desc: WKRP 105

programme.title: WKRP 121

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman babysits the Molly Will and a few of their friends during a sleepover

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Ava cannot share the love for the new Italian au pair Fabiano Udenio expressed by the family

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: When a Savoy employee is busted with an underage prostitute the sheriff the FBI and the casino all make their play to get the parties to cooperate Meanwhile Dixon and Violets romance heats up

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Hairdresser Barry styles the hair of the creme de la creme But when his clients wind up blackmailed to pay Barrys loan shark can the Harts help Barry break free before someone else winds up dead

programme.title: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After Gilligan is bitten by a rare deadly insect The Professor informs him that he has 24 hours left to live

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Investigating the murder of the agencys previous owner Mitch Garner and Ryan get involved with jewel smugglers a mysterious speedboat that is always speeding around Baywatch and a body that wont stay dead

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes genius is about to be publicly lauded in an autobiographical film But the actor playing him is found murdered in Arcanes trailer Who was the murderer - and was Arcane the intended victim

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: Contact is made with the planet Piri where the main computer created an idyllic life that led to extinction of its population through apathy Now John Koenig must fight to save Alpha as his people fall under the same fate

programme.title: Highlander
programme.desc: An immortal Scottish swordsman must confront the last of his immortal opponents a murderously brutal barbarian who lusts for the fabled Prize

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 208
programme.desc: Hercules 208

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: With a reporter on board the Taelon mother ship is highjacked into interdimensional space Liam is the prime suspect causing an even bigger rift between Daan and Zoor As the ship floats lost in space they must find the real culprit

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The team act as watchdogs protecting a secret and unprecedented meeting of international alien experts where they suspect one of them may be an alien

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim encounters Humphrey a dwarf who has escaped from the evil Dr Arcane

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: An immigrant cigar makers son is accosted by neighborhood bullies and calls the police to put a stop to the harassment The only witness to the incident is Dr Kimble whose face seems oddly familiar to the officers

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A handsome stranger saves Audras life during a horse stampede and she quickly becomes attached to him unaware of his involvement in a series of robberies in the Valley

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne falsely accused of murder escapes the law He returns to White Bluff to clear his name by joining a train of settlers headed to California A ministers sister threatens to turn him in to the law until she gets to know him

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Josh Lee is highly respected in the MMA community for his wrestling skills. In this episode, we follow Josh throughout his day, and see some well known HK fighters who have trained under him, such as Jess Elverum. It is Josh's hope that his ability to transfer his knowledge of wrestling will make big difference in his students' fighting. He would also love to see more people take up wrestling.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The updated adventures of a bumbling detective

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget must find a highly experimental missile stolen by Doctor Claw and stop him from using it to destroy Metro City

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians must stop three fire-breathing dinosaurmonster hybrids

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: A captured Cy-Kill is held temporarily on a remote prison planet Elba while a new Brainstorming device is readied; Fitor plots to rescue his cohort by defecting to the Guardians

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jal Rorda Audrics loyal friend is tricked and captured by Saw Boss where the evil scientist Dr Zorg is zapping him with the mindsifter to discover Audrics whereabouts Jayce defies Saw Boss and goes to the planet Nar to rescue Jal Gorda

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Oon is recalled by the Squire Smith for his obvious fear in the face of Monster Minds Oon fears he will be melted down Upon arriving on the Squire Smiths planet Oon walks into a trap set by Monster Minds He then proves himself to the Squire

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Every sail and all the sail-makers in Reykjavík have been confiscated by VENOM who play to raise the city from its foundations to find the lost fleet hidden beneath

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: In 1878 Jesse James robbed a gold shipment from Wells Fargo and hid it somewhere in Carlsbad Caverns New Mexico VENOM has discovered the clues leading them to the treasure but MASK is hot on their heels

programme.desc: A Lullaby Echoing in War
